response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience, including a strong background in GIS and geospatial data (GISCollective) and building high-throughput, low-latency systems. However, his recent tech stack heavily leans toward TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking recent professional experience in modern C++ or Rust, which are primary requirements for this role. While his systems programming and QA skills are excellent, the language mismatch and lack of specific routing pipeline experience make him a borderline candidate.
strengths: Strong domain experience in GIS and geospatial data processing as the founder of GISCollective.
Proven experience building high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Deep expertise in software quality assurance, Test-Driven Development (TDD), and test automation.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, the primary languages required for this role.
No direct experience mentioned with routing algorithms or navigation guidance systems, focusing mostly on general mapping.
Recent roles are predominantly web and full-stack focused (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than low-level backend systems engineering.
